name: ELITE PHARMACEUTICALS INC /NV/
summary: PART I General Elite Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a Nevada corporation (the Company, Elite, Elite Pharmaceuticals, the registrant, we, us or our) was incorporated on October 1, 1997 under the laws of the State of Delaware, and its wholly-owned subsidiary, Elite Laboratories, Inc. (Elite Labs), was incorporated on August 23, 1990 under the laws of the State of Delaware. On January 5, 2012, Elite Pharmaceuticals was reincorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada.
